stemHtml: A pilot compares the directional gyro (DG) heading with the magnetic compass and finds out they are not aligned. What is the correct action to be taken?

options.a: Synchronise the DG to the magnetic compass heading
options.b: Re align the IRS via outside references
options.c: Ignore the compass and continue using the DG
options.d: Land as soon as possible and synchronise the DG as you cannot synchronise it mid-flight
